scripts.build: pnpm --filter @housetour/db build && pnpm --filter @housetour/api-contract build && pnpm --filter @housetour/tour-engine build && pnpm --filter @housetour/pipeline build && pnpm --filter @housetour/web build && pnpm --filter @housetour/worker build
scripts.db:setup: pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm docker:up && sleep 3 && pnpm db:setup
